title: androsace stenophylla
intro: Androsace stenophylla, also known as Himalayan rock jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan Mountains. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective against various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Androsace stenophylla include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
